narrative: Optimized daily content workflows by architecting reusable master design templates, effectively slicing routine production time by 50%. Supported senior creative teams in translating complex briefs into high-volume, pixel-perfect visuals for major client accounts.

Spearheaded visual strategy for multiple high-stakes client accounts, delivering over 115+ strategic marketing assets with rigorous brand fidelity. Collaborated closely with marketing leads to synthesize creative vision with strategic campaign objectives while ensuring zero missed deadlines.

Orchestrating the complete project lifecycle for 10+ high-end digital solutions. I specialized in building scalable internal systems using Next.js and Laravel, while pioneered a SaaS MVP integrating IBM Granite LLM that achieved sub-3-second generation speeds.
